mapper.select:
SELECT member_id AS memberId, email AS email, nickname AS nickname, role AS role, is_active AS active FROM member
WHERE nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY member_id DESC

SELECT r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title AS title, m.nickname AS authorNickname, r.is_public AS isPublic, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review rv WHERE rv.recipe_id = r.recipe_id) AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report rp WHERE rp.recipe_id = r.recipe_id) AS reportCount FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN member m ON m.member_id = r.author_id WHERE ( r.author_id IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM report rp WHERE rp.recipe_id = r.recipe_id) )
AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY reportCount DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT rv.review_id AS reviewId, rv.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title AS recipeTitle, m.nickname AS authorNickname, rv.rating AS rating, rv.content AS content, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report rp WHERE rp.review_id = rv.review_id) AS reportCount, rv.created_at AS createdAt FROM review rv JOIN member m ON m.member_id = rv.member_id JOIN recipe r ON r.recipe_id = rv.recipe_id ORDER BY reportCount DESC, rv.created_at DESC
SELECT role FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE is_active = 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cp.member_id) FROM challenge_participant cp JOIN challenge c ON c.challenge_id = cp.challenge_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date
